war.title: Faction War
war.subtitle: Weekly war resets every Monday. Your activity earns points for your faction.
war.alreadyJoined: You are already a member of {{name}}
war.chooseDesc: This is a permanent choice. Choose carefully — you can never switch factions.

seasons.title: Season Rankings
seasons.subtitle: Current season leaderboard. Top 10 at season end enter the Hall of Fame.

hof.title: Hall of Fame
hof.subtitle: Legends who reached the top 10 at the end of a season. These records are permanent.
hof.noEntries: No completed seasons yet. Be the first to earn your place in history.
